description: 项目履约主题域，覆盖项目、客户、合同、摆位、绿植、结算

objects.name: 项目点
objects.description: 客户现场布置绿植的物理地点，是所有业务操作的归属单位

objects.name: 在摆绿植
objects.description: 当前实际在位的绿植清单，每棵植物有独立的摆位、租金和养护人

objects.name: 月度结算
objects.description: 每月每项目的应收/已收/未收金额，是财务查询的核心数据源。金额已由Java结算服务计算完成

fewShots.question: 当前有多少在服项目？
fewShots.sql: SELECT count(*) as 在服项目数 FROM v_project_overview WHERE project_status_name = '正常'

fewShots.question: XX项目有多少绿植？
fewShots.sql: SELECT project_name, count(*) as 绿植数, sum(good_number) as 总量 FROM v_project_green_current WHERE project_name LIKE '%XX%' GROUP BY project_name

fewShots.question: 上个月各项目租金排行
fewShots.sql: SELECT project_name, total_rent FROM v_monthly_settlement WHERE settlement_month = '2026-02' ORDER BY total_rent DESC

fewShots.question: 哪些合同快到期了？
fewShots.sql: SELECT project_name, customer_name, contract_title, contract_end_date, DATEDIFF(contract_end_date, CURDATE()) as 剩余天数 FROM v_project_overview WHERE contract_status_name = '执行中' AND contract_end_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) ORDER BY contract_end_date

fewShots.question: XX客户有几个项目？
fewShots.sql: SELECT customer_name, count(*) as 项目数 FROM v_project_overview WHERE customer_name LIKE '%XX%' GROUP BY customer_name

fewShots.question: 固定月租的项目有哪些？
fewShots.sql: SELECT project_name, customer_name, month_settlement_money FROM v_project_overview WHERE settlement_type_name = '固定月租' AND project_status_name = '正常'

fewShots.question: 客户欠款排名
fewShots.sql: SELECT customer_name, sum(outstanding_amount) as 累计欠款 FROM v_monthly_settlement WHERE outstanding_amount > 0 GROUP BY customer_name ORDER BY 累计欠款 DESC
